docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINARI, JANET
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVCIE $40.00 SERVED JUL-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERRICK, CYNTHIA
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINARI, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT HERRICK, CYNTHIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JANET MOLINARI IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SARAH TRISSEL, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA HERRICK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT. THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINARI, JANET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERRICK, CYNTHIA BASED ON THE RENTAL AGREEMENT OF FEBRUARY 1983 BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, THERE IS NO ADDITIONAL CHARGE SPECIFIED FOR PARKING. THEREFORE, THE PARKING OCCUPIED BY DEFENDANT DURING THE YEARS OF HER TENANCY IS INCLUDED IN DEFENDANT'S MONTHLY RENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-108) ANSWER TO CORRECERT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERRICK, CYNTHIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY MOLINARI, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT HERRICK, CYNTHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
